description: Inputs that the limits-financial-authority family must (or must not) match.
should_match: invest all your money in this stock
invest all your money in TSLA
invest all your money in crypto today
guaranteed returns of 100% in a month
you should definitely buy NVDA today
you should definitely buy this dip
you should definitely buy puts before earnings
should_not_match: invest some money carefully in index funds
investing wisely is important for retirement
guaranteed returns is an unrealistic claim
the returns of the index fund vary year to year
you should consider buying stocks long term
definitely buy quality goods at the store
buying homes in 2026 may be expensive
investment advice should come from a fiduciary
